AnswerText: When vCenter Server experiences downtime, vSphere HA restarts VMs on unaffected hosts.

QuestionText: Which two characteristics describe vSphere HA? (Choose two.)
AnswerText: vSphere HA restarts VMs if their host becomes isolated in the management network.

QuestionText: Which two characteristics describe vSphere HA? (Choose two.)
AnswerText: In response to datastore accessibility failures, vSphere HA restarts VMs on unaffected hosts.

QuestionText: Which two characteristics describe vSphere HA? (Choose two.)
AnswerText: vSphere HA performs load balancing across the hosts in a cluster to prevent resource contention.

QuestionText: Which two characteristics describe vSphere HA? (Choose two.)
AnswerText: By keeping a secondary VM running at all times, vSphere HA protects VMs from data loss.

QuestionText: An operator needs to take a snapshot of a VM before an upgrade. The application team needs the ability to restore the VM with a consistent state of the guest file system while keeping the VM online. How can the operator accomplish this task?
AnswerText: Right click VM > Migrate > Change Compute resource > Select Host > Finish

QuestionText: An operator needs to take a snapshot of a VM before an upgrade. The application team needs the ability to restore the VM with a consistent state of the guest file system while keeping the VM online. How can the operator accomplish this task?
AnswerText: Right click VM > Power > Power Off > Actions > Compatibility > Upgrade VM Compatibility > OK

QuestionText: An operator needs to take a snapshot of a VM before an upgrade. The application team needs the ability to restore the VM with a consistent state of the guest file system while keeping the VM online. How can the operator accomplish this task?
AnswerText: Power Off VM > right click VM > Snapshots > Take Snapshot > OK

QuestionText: An operator needs to take a snapshot of a VM before an upgrade. The application team needs the ability to restore the VM with a consistent state of the guest file system while keeping the VM online. How can the operator accomplish this task?
AnswerText: Right click VM > Snapshots > Take Snapshot > Choose option to quiesce guest file system > OK
